title: Chocolate Quest Golden Apple Edition
description: Chocolate Quest: Golden Apple is an unofficial remake of the Better Dungeons (Chocolate Quest) mod.
body:
## Chocolate Quest: Golden Apple is an unofficial remake of the Better Dungeons (Chocolate Quest) mod

![In-game screen and logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f44f9021a05da0c04d2b23c665f5fe008767e54e_0.webp)

This mod requires GeckoLib and Curios API

This project changes the original mode. It adds new content and better visuals. The gameplay is bigger. But it still keeps the idea of exploring and fighting in dungeons.
